changes.value:
## What
Create `swissarmyhammer-search/src/fuzzy.rs` — fuzzy search logic using `fuzzy-matcher` SkimMatcherV2. Matches query against all string fields and body text of indexed documents.

Pattern to follow: `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/search_symbol.rs:83-104` (SkimMatcherV2 usage).

Implementation:
- `fuzzy_search(documents: &[Document], query: &str, limit: usize) -> Vec<SearchResult>`
- For each document, run `matcher.fuzzy_match()` against each field value and body
- Track which field produced the best score
- Normalize scores to [0.0, 1.0] range
- Return top-k by descending score
- Short-circuit: skip body matching if a field already scores high

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Fuzzy search finds documents by partial title match
- [ ] Fuzzy search finds documents by frontmatter field values
- [ ] Fuzzy search finds documents by body content
- [ ] Results include `matched_field` indicating which field matched
- [ ] Results sorted by descending score, limited to `limit`

## Tests
- [ ] `test_fuzzy_title_match` — "auth" matches document with title "Authentication flow"
- [ ] `test_fuzzy_field_match` — matches on frontmatter field values
- [ ] `test_fuzzy_body_match` — matches on markdown body content
- [ ] `test_fuzzy_ranking` — better matches score higher
- [ ] `test_fuzzy_no_match` — returns empty for non-matching query
- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-search fuzzy`
Implement fuzzy search over document fields

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,27 +1,26 @@
 ## What
-Create `swissarmyhammer-search/src/fuzzy.rs` — fuzzy search logic using `fuzzy-matcher` SkimMatcherV2. Matches query against all string fields and body text of indexed documents.
+Create `swissarmyhammer-entity-search/src/fuzzy.rs` — fuzzy search using `fuzzy-matcher` SkimMatcherV2 over Entity objects. Iterates entity.fields values (stringified) and matches against the query.

-Pattern to follow: `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/search_symbol.rs:83-104` (SkimMatcherV2 usage).
+Pattern to follow: `swissarmyhammer-code-context/src/ops/search_symbol.rs:83-104`

 Implementation:
-- `fuzzy_search(documents: &[Document], query: &str, limit: usize) -> Vec<SearchResult>`
-- For each document, run `matcher.fuzzy_match()` against each field value and body
-- Track which field produced the best score
+- `fuzzy_search(entities: &[Entity], query: &str, limit: usize) -> Vec<SearchResult>`
+- For each entity, run `matcher.fuzzy_match()` against each field value (strings, stringified arrays) and body
+- Track which field produced the best score via `matched_field`
 - Normalize scores to [0.0, 1.0] range
 - Return top-k by descending score
-- Short-circuit: skip body matching if a field already scores high

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] Fuzzy search finds documents by partial title match
-- [ ] Fuzzy search finds documents by frontmatter field values
-- [ ] Fuzzy search finds documents by body content
-- [ ] Results include `matched_field` indicating which field matched
+- [ ] Fuzzy search finds entities by partial field match (title, name, etc.)
+- [ ] Fuzzy search finds entities by body/description content
+- [ ] Results include `matched_field` indicating which field matched best
 - [ ] Results sorted by descending score, limited to `limit`
+- [ ] Works for any entity type (task, tag, column, etc.)

 ## Tests
-- [ ] `test_fuzzy_title_match` — "auth" matches document with title "Authentication flow"
-- [ ] `test_fuzzy_field_match` — matches on frontmatter field values
-- [ ] `test_fuzzy_body_match` — matches on markdown body content
+- [ ] `test_fuzzy_title_match` — \"auth\" matches entity with title \"Authentication flow\"
+- [ ] `test_fuzzy_field_match` — matches on arbitrary field values
+- [ ] `test_fuzzy_body_match` — matches on body field content
 - [ ] `test_fuzzy_ranking` — better matches score higher
 - [ ] `test_fuzzy_no_match` — returns empty for non-matching query
-- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-search fuzzy`
\ No newline at end of file
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-entity-search fuzzy`
\ No newline at end of file

+- `fuzzy_search(documents: &[Document], query: &str, limit: usize) -> Vec<SearchResult>`
+- For each document, run `matcher.fuzzy_match()` against each field value and body
+- Track which field produced the best score
 - Normalize scores to [0.0, 1.0] range
 - Return top-k by descending score
+- Short-circuit: skip body matching if a field already scores high

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] Fuzzy search finds entities by partial field match (title, name, etc.)
-- [ ] Fuzzy search finds entities by body/description content
-- [ ] Results include `matched_field` indicating which field matched best
+- [ ] Fuzzy search finds documents by partial title match
+- [ ] Fuzzy search finds documents by frontmatter field values
+- [ ] Fuzzy search finds documents by body content
+- [ ] Results include `matched_field` indicating which field matched
 - [ ] Results sorted by descending score, limited to `limit`
-- [ ] Works for any entity type (task, tag, column, etc.)

-- [ ] `test_fuzzy_field_match` — matches on arbitrary field values
-- [ ] `test_fuzzy_body_match` — matches on body field content
+- [ ] `test_fuzzy_title_match` — "auth" matches document with title "Authentication flow"
+- [ ] `test_fuzzy_field_match` — matches on frontmatter field values
+- [ ] `test_fuzzy_body_match` — matches on markdown body content
 - [ ] `test_fuzzy_ranking` — better matches score higher
 - [ ] `test_fuzzy_no_match` — returns empty for non-matching query
-- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-entity-search fuzzy`
\ No newline at end of file
